summary: Frontend-only testing of Breaking Nomad marketing site complete. All sections render, all data-testids present, form validation (empty email prevents success), chip toggle (bg rgb(36,50,36), is-selected class), cursor head-tracking (rotate transforms on .bn-head), story sidebar active-state, image loading (8/8 loaded, 0 broken), and no horizontal overflow at 1920 or 390. Zero console errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All specified data-testids verified. Form is intentionally frontend-only (no API). Waitlist submission is local React state.
verified_flows: Hero: title, tagline, CTA (hero-cta-waitlist) visible; SVG illustration renders
Nav: all 4 nav-link testids present with correct hrefs (#story,#how,#escapes,#apply)
Head-tracking: 5 .bn-head elements receive rotate() transforms on pointermove
Story: 4 chapter nav items; is-active applied to chapter-1 when scrolled to story section
How It Works: how-step-01/02/03 all present
Escapes: escape-1, escape-2 both present; all 8 images loaded (no broken)
Itinerary: 8 days including day-01 and day-21; reserve-cta href=#apply
Application form: empty email blocks success; full submit shows success message; mountains chip toggles is-selected class with bg rgb(36,50,36)
